THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE AS SETTLED. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF OR DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID MCDONALD; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED.
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 2/16/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,400.00 FILED BY GALGUERA, TOMAS AS TO DEFENDANT RYAN PROPERTIES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-19-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-19-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO APR-09-2018 AT 5:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 PLAINTIFF TOMAS GALGUERA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT RYAN PROPERTIES IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY ROGER RYAN, OWNER. PARTIES PARTICIPATED IN THE MEDIATION PROGRAM AND HAVE REACHED A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. IF NO APPEARANCES AT THE APRIL HEARING, CASE TO BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS SETTLED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CECILIA P. CASTELLANOS; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
